common.admin_required: To view disk temperatures, you need to restart in administrator mode.

permissions.title: System Permissions
permissions.description: Configure execution privileges to enable advanced hardware functions.

maintenance_reset.title: CRITICAL WARNING
maintenance_reset.description: You are about to reset ALL maintenance protocols.

stats_reset.title: RESET STATISTICS
stats_reset.description: Are you sure you want to reset the selected statistics?

backup_create.title: CREATE NEW ORIGINAL BACKUP
backup_create.description: The current original backup will be replaced by the current Windows settings.
backup_create.detail: This backup will be used to restore the original Windows settings when you deactivate gaming mode.

factory_reset.title: RESTORE FACTORY VALUES
factory_reset.description: The following changes will be applied:

backup_section.title: Gaming Mode - Original Backup
backup_section.description: The original backup is used to restore Windows settings when gaming mode is deactivated.
backup_section.backup_detail: This backup contains the original Windows state before any modification. It is used when removing gaming mode to restore previous values.
backup_section.warning: When creating a new original backup, the previous one will be replaced. Make sure the current Windows settings are what you want to save.

factory_section.title: Factory Reset
factory_section.description: Restores the application and Windows to factory state. Master backup values will be applied.
factory_section.warning_detail: This action cannot be undone. All progress and custom configurations will be deleted.

stats_section.title: Reset Statistics
stats_section.description: Select which statistics you want to reset to zero:

maintenance_section.title: Data Maintenance
maintenance_section.description: Manage the history of completed maintenance protocols
maintenance_section.warning_detail: This action will delete all completion dates and checklist progress. Protocols return to their initial pending state.

ultraPower.label: Maximum Performance Plan
ultraPower.desc: Forces the CPU to maintain high frequencies without throttling.
ultraPower.tooltip: Activates Windows Ultimate Performance plan. Consumes more energy.

disableWinTelemetry.label: Disable Telemetry
disableWinTelemetry.desc: Suspends DiagTrack and dmwappushservice in the background.
disableWinTelemetry.tooltip: Stops Windows data collection services. Restores when closed.

silenceNotifications.label: Critical Focus Mode
silenceNotifications.desc: Suppresses notifications and pop-ups during gaming.
silenceNotifications.tooltip: Activates Focus Assist at maximum level. Only alarms pass.

gameMode.label: Windows Game Mode
gameMode.desc: Optimizes the system scheduler to prioritize gaming.
gameMode.tooltip: Activates AutoGameMode in registry. Disables Game Bar to free resources.

gaming.title: Gaming Mode
gaming.warning_errors: could not be applied. The rest is active.
gaming.info_changes: Changes are automatically reverted when closing the application.

restore.title: Restore original configuration?
restore.description: This will revert all active changes and restore the previous system configuration.

new_preset.title: Create New Preset
new_preset.description: Save the current configuration as preset:

sentinel.title: Sentinel Control
sentinel.subtitle: Automatic optimization when threshold is exceeded

close_dialog.simple_body: Are you sure you want to close the application?
close_dialog.gaming_body: What do you want to do when closing the application?
close_dialog.maintain_desc: Keep gaming mode settings active on Windows
close_dialog.gaming_footer: You can manage gaming mode again from Settings when you open the app again.
close_dialog.error_body_default: Admin permissions are required to remove gaming mode.
close_dialog.error_accept: Do you accept the permissions to continue?

detail.schedule_next: Today's date will be recorded and the next reminder scheduled.
detail.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset this maintenance? The current progress and completion date will be lost.

limpieza_basica.descripcion: Superficial cleaning of the equipment exterior, keyboard, screen and visible fans without opening the case.

advertencias.0: Turn off the equipment completely before starting
advertencias.1: Do not use liquids directly on the equipment
advertencias.2: Use only slightly damp microfiber cloths

checklist.0: Turn off and unplug the equipment
checklist.4: Clean USB ports with compressed air

limpieza_interna.descripcion: Deep cleaning of the equipment interior, removing dust from internal components, fans and heatsinks.

advertencias.0: Disconnect power completely before opening the equipment
advertencias.1: Discharge static electricity by touching a metal surface
advertencias.2: Do not touch electronic components directly with your hands
advertencias.3: Hold the fans while cleaning to prevent them from spinning freely

checklist.0: Turn off and unplug the equipment
checklist.3: Take a photo of the configuration for reference
checklist.7: Clean dust filters if they exist
checklist.8: Verify all cables are properly connected

3.titulo: How to use compressed air to clean PC

pasta_termica.descripcion: Replacement of thermal paste between the processor and its heatsink to improve heat transfer.

advertencias.0: This task requires prior experience opening equipment
advertencias.1: Make sure you have quality thermal paste
advertencias.2: Never turn on the equipment without the heatsink installed
advertencias.3: Clean the old thermal paste completely before applying the new one
advertencias.4: Apply only an amount the size of a rice grain

checklist.0: Turn off and unplug the equipment
checklist.5: Clean old thermal paste with isopropyl alcohol
checklist.6: Apply new thermal paste in the center of the processor
checklist.9: Turn on and verify temperatures in BIOS

0.titulo: Thermal paste change with all in one

1.titulo: Thermal paste change with traditional fan

optimizacion_software.descripcion: Update and optimization of hardware drivers to improve system performance and stability.

advertencias.0: Create a system restore point before making major changes
advertencias.1: Make sure to download drivers only from official sites

backup_datos.descripcion: Backup of important files on external devices or cloud services to prevent data loss.

advertencias.1: Keep at least 2 copies of critical files
advertencias.2: Consider the 3-2-1 rule: 3 copies, 2 different media, 1 off-site

checklist.1: Connect external drive or verify cloud space

0.titulo: How to backup with external drive

home.subtitle: Mantech Labs is collecting real-time data from your workstation.

status.critical_detail: It is recommended to close heavy processes to avoid bottlenecks.
status.warning_detail: The system is operating near its nominal limit.
status.stable_detail: Scanning for anomalies... No irregularities detected.
